description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Update API Docs that can be triggered manually. In an ubuntu-20.04 job, check out the repository, install Doxygen and graphviz, generate API documentation with Doxygen, then check out a secondary repository for hosting the docs, copy the generated documentation into it, commit the changes with metadata from the original commit, and push the updated documentation to the secondary repository's main branch using a provided GitHub token.
